input.command:
COH=~/Library/Application\ Support/LaunchCat/coh
LOG="$COH/logs/launcher/launcher.log"
OFF=$(cat /tmp/coh_log_offset.txt 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
sleep 3

echo "=== new launcher.log since launch ==="
tail -c +$((OFF+1)) "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'auth|token|login|profile live|transitioned|error|fail|running' | tail -15

echo
echo "=== health snapshot ==="
echo "launcher.exe: $(ps aux | grep -iE 'launcher\.exe' | grep -v grep | awk '{print "pid="$2" cpu="$3"%"}')"
echo "launcher.running lock (should be recreated with LIVE pid now): $(cat "$COH/settings/launcher/launcher.running" 2>/dev/null || echo 'absent')"
echo
echo "=== any CPU spinners? (top 3) ==="
ps -axo pcpu,pid,comm | sort -rn | head -3
echo
echo "=== window still up ==="
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to tell (first process whose name is "wine64-preloader") to get name of windows' 2>/dev/null || echo "(none)"
input.description: Confirm auth, health, and no CPU spin
